title: Check Prime or Not
shortStatement: Check if a given number is prime or not.
statement: Given an integer n, write a program to check if it is prime. A prime number is a number greater than 1 that has no positive divisors other than 1 and itself.

title: Check Even or Odd
shortStatement: Determine if a given number is even or odd.
statement: Write a program to check if a given number is even or odd.

title: Factorial of a Number
shortStatement: Calculate the factorial of a given integer.
statement: Write a program to calculate the factorial of a given number n. Factorial of n (notated as n!) is the product of all positive integers less than or equal to n.

solutions.python:
def factorial(n):
    fact = 1
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        fact = fact * i
    return fact
    
n = 5
print(factorial(n))

title: Fibonacci Series
shortStatement: Find the n-th Fibonacci number.
statement: Write a program to find the n-th Fibonacci number. The Fibonacci sequence is defined as F(0) = 0, F(1) = 1, and F(i) = F(i-1) + F(i-2) for i >= 2.

solutions.python:
def fibonacci(n):
    if n <= 0: return 0
    if n == 1: return 1
    
    a, b = 0, 1
    for _ in range(n - 1):
        a, b = b, a + b
    return b

n = 6
print(fibonacci(n))

title: Reverse a Number
shortStatement: Reverse the digits of a given integer.
statement: Write a program to reverse the digits of an integer n.

solutions.python:
def rev(n):
    summ = 0
    while n > 0:
        summ = summ * 10 + n % 10  
        n = n // 10
    return summ

print(rev(1234))

title: Check Palindrome Number
shortStatement: Verify if a given number is a palindrome.
statement: Write a program to check if an integer n is a palindrome. A number is a palindrome if it reads the same backward as forward.

title: Armstrong Number
shortStatement: Check if a number is an Armstrong number.
statement: Write a program to check if an integer is an Armstrong number. An Armstrong number is a number that is equal to the sum of its own digits raised to the power of the number of digits.

solutions.python:
def is_armstrong(num):
    s = str(num)
    n = len(s)
    return sum(int(digit) ** n for digit in s) == num

print(is_armstrong(153))

title: Armstrong Number Check (123)
shortStatement: Armstrong checker sample returning False.
statement: Identify if integer 123 is an Armstrong number.

solutions.python:
def is_armstrong(num):
    s = str(num)
    n = len(s)
    return sum(int(digit) ** n for digit in s) == num

print(is_armstrong(123))

title: Sum of Digits
shortStatement: Calculate the sum of the digits of a given number.
statement: Write a program to find the sum of all digits of a given integer n.

solutions.python:
def get_sum(n):
    summ = 0
    while n > 0:
        digit = n % 10
        summ += digit
        n = n // 10
    return summ

print(get_sum(1234))

title: Largest of Three Numbers
shortStatement: Find the maximum value among three numbers.
statement: Write a program to find the largest of three given numbers a, b, and c.

solutions.python:
def largest(a,b,c):
    Largest = max(a,b,c)
    return Largest

a = 10
b = 9
c = 100
print(largest(a,b,c))

title: GCD of Two Numbers
shortStatement: Calculate the Greatest Common Divisor (GCD) of two integers.
statement: Write a program to find the Greatest Common Divisor (GCD) of two numbers a and b.

solutions.python:
def GCD(a, b):
    while b != 0:
        a, b = b, a % b
    return a

a = 5 
b = 10
print(GCD(a, b))

title: LCM of Two Numbers
shortStatement: Calculate the Least Common Multiple (LCM) of two integers.
statement: Write a program to find the Least Common Multiple (LCM) of two numbers a and b.

title: Check Leap Year
shortStatement: Verify if a given year is a leap year.
statement: Write a program to check if a year n is a leap year. A year is a leap year if it is divisible by 4, but not divisible by 100 unless it is also divisible by 400.

solutions.python:

statement: Write a program to check if two strings s1 and s2 are anagrams of each other. Two strings are anagrams if they contain the same characters in a different order (case-insensitive).

title: Binary Search

title: Count words in a string
shortStatement: Count total words in a sentence space separated.
statement: Write a program to count total number of space-separated words in a string.

title: Remove all spaces from a string
shortStatement: Strip all spaces from a text string.
statement: Write a program to strip all whitespace characters from a string.

solutions.python:
def rem_spaces(s):
    s = s.replace(' ', '')
    return s

s = 'Varun is good boy'
print(rem_spaces(s))

title: Find Duplicate elements in a Array

statement: Write a program to shift all 0 values to the end of the array in-place while keeping relative order of non-zero elements.

statement: Write a program to check if a string s is a palindrome.

title: Count number of Digits
shortStatement: Count total digits in an integer.
statement: Write a program to count total number of digits in an integer n.

solutions.python:
def count_digits(n):
    count = 0
    while n != 0:
        n //= 10
        count += 1
    return count

n = 12345
print(count_digits(n))

title: Sum of elements in a array
shortStatement: Find the sum of all elements in an array.
statement: Write a program to sum up all elements in an array.

solutions.python:
def summ(arr):
    summ = 0
    for i in arr:
        summ = summ + i
    return summ

arr = [1,2,3,4,5,100]
print(summ(arr))

title: Find Minimum element in an array
shortStatement: Find the minimum value in an integer array.
statement: Write a program to find the minimum value in an integer array.
